title: Setting Loose POSIX File Permissions for Others
description: Granting permissions to the 'others' category in Unix file system permissions can lead to unintended access to files or directories, potentially allowing attackers to obtain sensitive information, disrupt services or elevate privileges.
recommendation: Review and adjust file permissions to restrict access to the 'others' category.
impact: Potential unauthorized access to sensitive files or disruption of services.

checks.message: Review and adjust file permissions to restrict access to the 'others' category
